description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser thanatopic metamagic rod 9,000 gp Thanatopic metamagic rod 32,500 gp Greater thanatopic metamagic rod 73,000 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are affected as though using the Thanatopic Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Thanatopic Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser thanatopic metamagic rod 4,500 gp Thanatopic metamagic rod 16,250 gp Greater thanatopic metamagic rod 36,500 gp
